channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 115,087 → 117,080 (+1,993)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 117,080 | Forks: 15,207

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 54,355 → 56,050 (+1,695)
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 15 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 56,050 | Forks: 7,320

item.title: [AI] system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description:

(And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
Category: AI Stars: 133,652 | Forks: 33,696

item.title: [AI] JavaGuide
